summary: Completed backend + frontend verification for admin login, delivery-file placeholders, analytics exports/chart tools, scheduled report staging UI, blog SEO tools/meta/schema, music placeholders, and product image/carousel/payment gating regression checks.
action_items: No blocking defects found for requested scope; proceed with main agent validation/review.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin analytics/scheduled-settings and blog SEO tooling are present and wired to API payloads as expected.
Public product metadata correctly exposes delivery file metadata without leaking MongoDB file payload fields.
Checkout status page gracefully handles invalid/nonexistent session IDs by showing a non-crashing status message.
seed_data_creation: Temporary paid transaction record inserted and cleaned up within test_paid_download_gating_unpaid_and_seeded_paid.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 added focused regression/API verification for requested admin analytics + delivery placeholders + SEO + music placeholders + payment gating. All executed tests passed (10/10 total across two pytest runs). UI run validated admin/product/blog/music/checkout flows and selectors without blocking errors.
rca of the issue: No new defects reproduced in requested scope. Observed 404 console noise only when intentionally opening checkout page with a nonexistent session_id; UI fallback message handled this safely.
